title: Position
description: Represents a staffing position within the Workday system, defining a role within an organization that can be filled by a worker.

id.description: The unique Workday identifier for the position

descriptor.description: The display name of the position

jobProfile.description: The job profile associated with this position

supervisoryOrganization.description: The supervisory organization this position belongs to

location.description: The work location of the position

isFilled.description: Whether the position is currently filled by a worker

worker.description: The worker currently filling this position

availableDate.description: The date the position becomes available

earliestHireDate.description: The earliest date a hire can be made for this position

timeType.description: The time type (Full Time, Part Time) for the position

workerType.description: The worker type (Employee, Contingent Worker) for the position
